description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. Two fragments from the right side. Concerning a release granted by a creditor to Abū l-Mufaḍḍal. Dating: mentions [14]36 Seleucid = 1124/25 CE. It seems that Abū l-Mufaḍḍal (line 9) undertakes to salvage something from the authorities (sulṭān, line 4). (Information in part from Goitein's index card and CUDL.) Join: Alan Elbaum. Additionally, T-S 10J7.11 + T-S NS J81 (PGPID 7858) and T-S NS 292.10 (PGPID 8651) are related and potentially an indirect join.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב ידו של חלפון ב. מנשה, שחרור שניתן על ידי נושה לאבו אל-מופדל
